narendra modi.name: Narendra Modi
narendra modi.misuse_note: Name is very frequently misused in fake government scheme scams. Always verify at pmindia.gov.in or pib.gov.in.

amit shah.name: Amit Shah
amit shah.affiliation: Government of India, Ministry of Home Affairs
amit shah.misuse_note: Name used in fake police/CBI threat messages. MHA never contacts citizens via WhatsApp.

rahul gandhi.name: Rahul Gandhi
rahul gandhi.role: Leader of Opposition, Member of Parliament (Wayanad/Raebareli)
rahul gandhi.misuse_note: Name used in fabricated quotes and political propaganda. Verify via official INC channels.

arvind kejriwal.name: Arvind Kejriwal
arvind kejriwal.misuse_note: Name used in fake Delhi government scheme messages. Delhi govt scheme info is at delhi.gov.in.

yogi adityanath.name: Yogi Adityanath
yogi adityanath.misuse_note: Name used in fake UP government scheme and land allotment scams. Always check up.gov.in.

mamata banerjee.name: Mamata Banerjee
mamata banerjee.misuse_note: Name used in fake WB government benefit scams. Verify at wb.gov.in.

gautam adani.name: Gautam Adani
gautam adani.affiliation: Adani Group (Ports, Energy, Airports, Cement, Media)
gautam adani.misuse_note: Name used in fake investment scam ads ('Adani Ji's secret stock'). Adani Group does not offer guaranteed returns via WhatsApp.

mukesh ambani.name: Mukesh Ambani
mukesh ambani.misuse_note: Name massively abused in 'free Jio data' and 'Reliance lottery' scams. Jio never offers free 500GB data via WhatsApp links.

ratan tata.name: Ratan Tata
ratan tata.affiliation: Tata Group (TCS, Taj Hotels, Jaguar Land Rover)
ratan tata.misuse_note: Deceased (Oct 2024). Name frequently used in fake charity and investment scams after his passing.

elon musk.name: Elon Musk
elon musk.misuse_note: Name commonly used in fake crypto giveaway scams. Elon Musk does NOT give away Bitcoin or ETH via WhatsApp or Telegram.

virat kohli.name: Virat Kohli
virat kohli.misuse_note: Name used in fake betting app endorsements and investment scams. He does not personally endorse gambling platforms on WhatsApp.

shah rukh khan.name: Shah Rukh Khan
shah rukh khan.misuse_note: Name used in fake charity, film ticket giveaway, and investment app scams.

modi.name: Narendra Modi
modi.misuse_note: Name is very frequently misused in fake government scheme scams.

pm modi.name: Narendra Modi
pm modi.misuse_note: Frequently misused in fake government scheme scams. Verify at pmindia.gov.in.

adani.name: Gautam Adani
adani.misuse_note: Name used in fake guaranteed investment return scams.

ambani.name: Mukesh Ambani
ambani.misuse_note: Name massively abused in 'free Jio data' scams.

rbi.name: Reserve Bank of India (RBI)
rbi.misuse_note: RBI NEVER sends emails or WhatsApp messages asking for account details, OTPs, or passwords. Always verify at rbi.org.in.

pib.name: Press Information Bureau (PIB)
pib.role: Official Government of India Press Body
pib.affiliation: Government of India, Ministry of Information
known_for: Fact check debunking fake government news
pib.misuse_note: PIB Fact Check (pib.gov.in/factcheck.aspx) is the authoritative debunker of fake govt scheme news.

trai.name: TRAI (Telecom Regulatory Authority of India)
trai.misuse_note: TRAI does NOT call or WhatsApp users to block numbers or demand Aadhaar. Calls claiming to be TRAI threatening disconnection are scams.

pm.name: Prime Minister of India
pm.misuse_note: Generic title used in high-gravity death and health rumors. Always verify at pmindia.gov.in.

prime minister.name: Prime Minister of India
prime minister.misuse_note: Generic title used in high-gravity death and health rumors. Always verify at pmindia.gov.in.

cm.name: Chief Minister
cm.misuse_note: Generic title used in state-level political rumors and fake schemes.

chief minister.name: Chief Minister
chief minister.misuse_note: Generic title used in state-level political rumors and fake schemes.

rashtrapati.name: President of India
rashtrapati.misuse_note: Title used in extremely high-stakes fake news regarding constitutional changes or national emergencies.

president.name: President of India
president.misuse_note: Title used in extremely high-stakes fake news regarding constitutional changes or national emergencies.

sarkar.name: Government
sarkar.misuse_note: Term used to add false authority to fake schemes and announcements.

government.name: Government
government.misuse_note: Term used to add false authority to fake schemes and announcements.
